# This file is generated by the publisher script in the private AwowLab
# repo. Edits made here are overwritten on the next sync; development
# happens in the private repo (see the Contributing section of README.md).

cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.12)
project(Parser LANGUAGES CXX)

add_library(Parser STATIC
    src/Parser.cpp
)

target_include_directories(Parser
    PUBLIC
        ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/Include
)

target_link_libraries(Parser PUBLIC Txttokenizer)

# Precompiled header (base PCH without Vulkan/ImGui)
target_precompile_headers(Parser PRIVATE
    "$<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:CXX>:${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/../pch_base.h>"
)
